questiontext.text:
Download model: here
Run SWMM and answer all 10 parts.
1. What is the peak runoff rate for subcatchment A1 (LPS)? {1:NUMERICAL:=4325.693137:43.256931}
2. What is the maximum water depth at junction J10 (m)? {1:NUMERICAL:=0.728852:0.007289}
3. What is the maximum water depth in conduit T1-1 (m)? {1:NUMERICAL:=1.011208:0.010112}
4. What is the area of subcatchment A3 (hectares)? {1:NUMERICAL:=48.6854:0.486854}
5. What is the maximum water depth at storage node J7 (m)? {1:NUMERICAL:=2:0.02}
6. What is the diameter (Geom1 in [XSECTIONS]) of link T3-1 (m)? {1:NUMERICAL:=1.4287:0.014287}
7. What is the peak runoff rate for subcatchment A2 (LPS)? {1:NUMERICAL:=11592.75123:115.927512}
8. What is the maximum depth of junction J2 (m)? {1:NUMERICAL:=1.8452:0.018452}
9. What is the diameter (Geom1 in [XSECTIONS]) of link T2-2 (m)? {1:NUMERICAL:=2.0408:0.020408}
10. What is the peak runoff rate for subcatchment A3 (LPS)? {1:NUMERICAL:=5913.929347:59.139293}
